claim_boundary: Followup366 is an increment-gate and ROCm-lane status receipt. It does not create a new restart checkpoint; followup365 remains the retained residual-gate frontier.

followup366_increment_probe.assessment: The followup365 residual-gate checkpoint is already below tolerance. Forcing an additional attached-policy Newton correction with relative-increment convergence required produced no residual descent, so no new increment-gate checkpoint is promoted.

rocm_runtime_status.rocminfo_gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6900 XT / gfx1030 / 80 compute units

torch_rocm.impact: host_ilu_device_gmres profile cannot use the Torch ROCm device solver path in this environment.

rocm_runtime_status.assessment: Native HIP kernels work outside the sandbox and ROCm sees the RX 6900 XT, but Torch ROCm exposes no cuda/HIP device. The production Newton solver lane therefore needs the native HIP/Rust path rather than the current Torch device-GMRES profile.
